ats_utilities.option.strategy.parser_strategy module¶

Module

parser_strategy.py

Copyright

Info

Defines class ParserStrategy with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interfaces for ATS option parsing.

class ats_utilities.option.strategy.parser_strategy.ParserStrategy(context_bundle: ContextBundle | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: IParserStrategy

Defines class ParserStrategy with attribute(s) and method(s). Default built-in strategy using Python’s standard argparse module.

It defines:

attributes:
_checker - Injected parameters checker (default Checker).
_reporter - Injected reporter for messaging (default Reporter).
_verbose - Injected Enable/Disable verbose option (default False).
_parser - Options parser (default None).
methods:
__init__ - Initials ParserStrategy constructor.
setup - Initializes the underlying parser with metadata parameters.
add_argument - Adds an operational argument/flag to the parser.
add_version - Adds a version display option to the parser.
parse - Parses the input arguments and returns an OptionNamespace.
register_commands - Registers a list of commands with the parser.
parse_command - Parses the input arguments and returns command name and parameters.
is_initialized - Checks if the parser strategy is initialized.
__str__ - Returns the string representation of ParserStrategy.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
_checker: IChecker¶
_parser: ArgParser | None¶
_reporter: IReporter¶
_subparsers: Any¶
_verbose: bool¶
add_argument(*args: str, **kwargs: Any) → None[source]¶

Adds an operational argument/flag to the parser.

Parameters:

  • args (<str>) – List of flags for the ATS.

  • kwargs (<Any>) – Arguments in shape of dictionary.

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_parser’.
add_version(version: str | None) → None[source]¶

Adds a version display option to the parser.

Parameters:

version (<str | None>) – The ATS version | None.

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_parser’.
is_initialized() → bool[source]¶

Checks if parser strategy component is ok.

Returns:

True (success) | False (fail)

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

None.

parse(arguments: OptArgs, known_only: bool = False) → OptionNamespace[source]¶

Parses the input arguments and returns an OptionNamespace.

Parameters:

  • arguments (<OptArgs>) – Sequence of arguments | None.

  • known_only (<bool>) – Parse only known arguments (default False).

Returns:

Option namespace object.

Return type:

<OptionNamespace>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_parser’.
parse_command(arguments: OptArgs = None) → tuple[str, Mapping[str, Any]][source]¶

Parses the input arguments and returns command name and parameters.

Parameters:

arguments (<OptArgs>) – Sequence of arguments | None.

Returns:

Tuple containing command name and parsed parameters (read only data).

Return type:

<tuple[str, Mapping[str, Any]]>

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_parser’.
register_commands(commands: Sequence[IOptionCommand]) → None[source]¶

Registers the list of commands with the parser.

Parameters:

commands (<Sequence[IOptionCommand]>) – Sequence of commands to register (read only data).

Exceptions:
ATSValueError: Missing or empty attribute: ‘_parser’.
setup(parameters: Mapping[str, str]) → None[source]¶

Initializes the underlying parser with metadata parameters.

Parameters:

parameters (<Mapping[str, str]>) – Metadata parameters in mapping format (read only data).

Exceptions:
ATSTypeError: Parameter type validation failed.
ATSValueError: Parameter format validation failed.
ATSRuntimeError: Decorator used on a non-class method.
ATSAttributeError: Class does not provide a ‘_checker’ object.
